_comment: SYNTHETIC / NON-CLIENT / TEST ONLY — example only. Real firm configs live outside the repo at $HERMES_HOME/matter_mail_firm.json and are never committed.

mail_accounts.label: work
mail_accounts._comment: M365 work mailbox accessed through Outlook — fetched via Microsoft Graph

mail_accounts.label: gmail_outlook
mail_accounts._comment: personal Gmail account added to Outlook; not reachable via Graph — export from the Outlook client (.eml/.msg/.pst->convert), or set transport to gmail-api to fetch directly via the google-workspace skill

priority_windows.reason: primary email provider outage (synthetic example) — fallback mailbox used for nearly all matter correspondence in this span
